thoughts: The gmail skill has been loaded successfully. I can see it's a sophisticated tool that uses Chrome DevTools Protocol to fetch Gmail threads.
According to the task, I need to execute the gmail.py script which will run for 5-15 minutes.
The script auto-detects days to look back (default 3 weekdays) and caches results in SQLite.
I should run the main python script to start the sync process.
After execution completes, I need to verify success and send notification.
kvps.headline: Executing Gmail sync script

logs.heading: A0: Verifying completion and preparing notification

The script processed 56 threads total, with only 3 new messages fetched (most were cached).
Output was written to /a0/usr/workdir/gmail-output.md as expected.
Now I need to load the notify-user skill and send the completion notification as specified in the task.
The task explicitly states: 'On completion, load the notify-user skill using skills_tool and send: "Gmail sync done. Output: /a0/usr/workdir/gmail-output.md" --title "Gmail Data Sync"'
I should first verify the output file exists, then call the notify-user skill.
